# The Law Offices of Michael B. Dye — Salem, OR
> The Law Offices of Michael B. Dye — bilingual immigration attorney in Salem, Oregon. Green cards, citizenship, work permits, family petitions and deportation defense. Free, confidential consultation. 456 State St, Suite 200. Call (503) 581-5562. Downtown Salem immigration counsel on State St — free, confidential consultation.

## Services
- Family & Green Cards
- Citizenship & Naturalization
- Work Permits & Visas
- Removal / Deportation Defense
- Asylum & Humanitarian
- DACA & Renewals

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 581-5562 · Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm · Languages: English, Español

## FAQ
### How much does a consultation cost?
The consultation is free. The attorney explains any fees clearly before you decide &mdash; no surprises.

### Do you speak Spanish?
Yes &mdash; our team is fully bilingual and your consultation can be entirely in Spanish.

### Is what I share confidential?
Yes. What you share is kept confidential, and the attorney is bound by strict confidentiality.

### Does my immigration status affect talking to you?
No &mdash; speaking with us is confidential, and we never treat your status as a barrier to getting help.

### Someone was detained by ICE &mdash; what do I do?
Call us right away with the person's full name, A-number if known, and the facility. If it is an emergency, call 911.
